sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)

delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((GL like '%00' and not GL in ('3620000','3630000')) or (GL like '11%' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02','03')) or (GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and GL like '%03'))
update TransX set Contract = 'YE EQU ROLL' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Contract like '6%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '11%' and (substring(GL,6,1) = '9' or Ledger = 'UG')
update TransX set TTY = '100' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(TTY,'') <> ''
update TransX set Amt1 = -coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = -coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = -coalesce(Amt3,0) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '03' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and (GL like '11%' or (GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('04','05'))))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '00' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and ((GL >= '3000000' and GL < '3330000') or GL >= '3640000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '00' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, '3610000' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and GL >= '3600000' and GL < '3640000' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,  '99' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY,PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(PK,0) = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, case when Amt1>0 then Amt1 else 0 end as Amt1, case when Amt2>0 then Amt2 else 0 end as Amt2,  case when Amt3>0 then Amt3 else 0 end as Amt3,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, case when Amt1<0 then Amt1 else 0 end as Amt1, case when Amt2<0 then Amt2 else 0 end as Amt2,  case when Amt3<0 then Amt3 else 0 end as Amt3,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PK = 99 or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0))
update TransX set  Flex4 = 'YE Equity Roll '+PC, Flex5 = 'YE Equity Roll '+PC, Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)), Flex2 = cast(ABS(Amt2) as varchar(255)), Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '3610000'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt3) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt3) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, PTF, Contract, TTY, Amt3) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
